use_cases: Dark-themed website footer with distinctive tape graphic overlay
Footer component featuring LinkedIn and Twitter social links with hover effects
Decorative diagonal tape SVG element as brand accent
Corporate or creative portfolio footer section
ai_summary: A dark-themed footer component featuring a distinctive diagonal tape graphic rendered as SVG in dark gray tones. Includes social media navigation with LinkedIn and Twitter icons using Lucide React, with hover glow effects on interactive elements. Built with Next.js Link for accessibility and uses Tailwind for styling. The taped design aesthetic gives it a grunge or distressed creative vibe suitable for portfolios, creative agencies, or modern SaaS platforms.
